strengths: 17+ years of continuous software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — meets the 15-year minimum with breadth
Genuine entrepreneurial track record: founded GISCollective in 2016, still active, open-source and community-facing
Recent hands-on AI agent infrastructure work at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and recent (April 2025 onward only); no demonstrated ML/AI products at scale, no publications, no prior AI depth across 15+ years of career
Zero evidence of strategic advisory or executive stakeholder engagement — the role's core responsibility of advising customers and partners on cloud/AI adoption is entirely absent from the résumé
Title trajectory peaks at Staff Software Engineer, far below the Director-level IC seniority this role requires; no evidence of organizational influence at that scope
response.justification: The role is a Director-level IC position centered on recognized AI expertise and advising strategic customers and partners on cloud and AI adoption. Bogdan's AI engagement begins only in April 2025 — a single role — with no ML/AI depth across the preceding 16 years of his career, no demonstrated AI platforms at scale, and no Master's or PhD. Strategic advisory, the other dominant competency, is entirely absent: workshops and a conference talk demonstrate knowledge-sharing but not executive-level stakeholder influence or partner advisory. Cloud exposure is narrow (AWS CDK at Optilyz, Kubernetes for GISCollective). The entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective and cross-domain technical breadth are genuine positives, and the 15-year experience bar is met, but the two highest-weighted role competencies — AI depth and strategic advisory — lack concrete evidence, driving the score down.
